generalities.text: Main THE ENCYCLOPEDIA OF PURE MATERIA MEDICA By TIMOTHY F. ALLEN, A.M., M.D. Presented by Médi-T PIMPINELLA. Pimpinella saxifraga, L. Natural order , Umbelliferæ. Common names , Burnet saxifrage, Bibernell. Preparation , Tincture of the roots. Authorities. 1 , Schelling, A. H. Z., 28, 177, proving by chewing the fresh root; 1 a , same, repeated; 1 b , same, took 2 drops of tincture; 2 , Berridge, N. Am. J. of Hom., 1873, p. 502, a man took 10 drops of the 1st dil. HEAD. ► Great vertigo, inclination to one side, in the morning, on rising, [1a] . ► Dizzy confusion of the head, [1b] . ► Heat, rush of blood and confusion of the head, soon followed by bleeding of the nose, as much as forty drops of blood, [1] . ► Heat, rush of blood to the head, in the afternoon, [1] . ► Rushing in the whole head, especially down the back part, with pressure, that is increased by the rushing, [1b] . ► Dulness of the head, as if senseless and stupid, [1a] . ► Heaviness of the head, and inclination to sleep, while reading, [1b] . ► Weakness and sensation of heaviness in the head, [1] . ► Head feels tied up and compressed, [1a] . [10.] ► Whizzing in the head, and sounds, as in an empty barrel, [1a] . ► Dull frontal headache (immediately), [2] . ► Sticking in the forehead, extending to both sides above the eyes, [1a] . ► Pressing and pushing pain, extending from the temples to the occiput, and into the nape of the neck, [1a] . ► Pressive sticking-burning pain, extending from the vertex to both sides and down over the temples, [1a] . ► Pinching stitches on the vertex, [1a] . ► Fine pinching stitches in the vertex while reflecting, [1b] . ► Headache, especially in the occiput and nape of the neck (second day), [1a] . ► Sensation of coldness in the occiput, as though a draft of sharp wind were constantly blowing from behind; in a closed room, [1a] . ► Sensation of tension and pressive pain in the occiput, extending into the nape of the neck, [1a] . [20.] ► Constant, dull, pressive pain in the occiput, [1b] . ► Pain in the occiput, aggravated by reading, so that thought was difficult, [1b] . ► Acute stitches in the occiput, becoming concentrated about the protuberance, [1a] . ► Itching on the vertex, [1b] . EYE. ► Smarting pain in the right eye, [1a] . ► Burning in the eyes, especially on the upper surface of the eyeballs, [1b] . ► Disagreeable coolness in the eyes, quite opposed to the former burning and smarting, [1b] . ► Feeling of a stye in upper eyelid (he thinks the left ), (second morning), [2] . ► Smarting pain in the eyelids, [1a] . ► Vision dim and indistinct, for several minutes (second day), [1a] . [30.] ► The eyes seem enveloped in a mist, [1a] . EAR. ► Fine stitches, extending out through the right ear, associated with roaring, [1b] . ► Roaring in the ears, as from a distant noise, [1b] . NOSE. ► Nose stopped, dry (stopped catarrh), [1a] . FACE. ► Pain, as from an ulcer, in the right cheek, [1a] . MOUTH. ► Sore pressive pain in the stump of a tooth, in the left side of the lower jaw, [1b] . ► A burning aroma on the tongue, palate, and in the throat, [1] . ► Increased secretion of saliva, during and after chewing, [1] . ► Collection of mucus in the mouth and fauces obliging hawking (second day), [1a] . ► Acrid, burning, somewhat bitter, earthy taste in the mouth and fauces (immediately), [1b] . [40.] ► A persistent, penetrating, acrid taste while chewing the drug, and afterwards, felt not only in the mouth, but spreading a warmth through the whole body, for a minute, [1] . ► Mouldy taste (after a quarter of an hour), [1b] . THROAT. ► Hawking of tenacious whitish mucus from the arch of the palate, and a crumbly cheesy offensive concretion from the fauces, once repeated, followed by expectoration of mucus (second day), [1a] . STOMACH. ► Frequent eructations of gas (second day), [1a] . ► Frequent eructations, associated with vertigo and yawning, [1a] . ► Tasteless eructations (with pressure in the stomach), [1a] . ► Acid eructations, after stooping, [1b] . ABDOMEN. ► Fine stitches just above the navel, several times, [1b] . ► Rumbling and gurgling in the abdomen, with emission of flatus (second day), [1a] . ► Rumbling and gurgling in the abdomen, [1a] . STOOL. [50.] ► Purging, [2] . ► Stool dry, harder than usual, in the evening (first day), [1] . RESPIRATORY ORGANS. ► Oppression of breath, while walking, in the open air and in the house, [1a] . ► Respiration short, difficult; feeling of apprehension in the chest, [1a] . ► Frequently impelled to take a deep breath, which is accomplished with difficulty, [1b] . CHEST. ► The portion of the chest against which he is leaning by the table becomes painful, as if weary, [1a] . ► Transient, fine needlelike stitches back and forth, in the sides of the chest, in the back and small of the back, and in the walls of the abdomen, [1a] . HEART. ► Sensation of heaviness in the præcordial region and in the abdomen, as if the intestines would sink down from their own weight, [1b] . NECK AND BACK. ► Stiff neck (second day), [2] . ► Pressive and tensive pain in the nape of the neck, extending to the shoulder, [1b] . [60.] ► Constant pain, pressive contraction in various parts, alternately in the nape of the neck, side of the neck, and then in the right shoulder, [1a] . ► Constant tension and sticking in the nape of the neck, and in the occiput, [1a] . ► Pain, like a constriction, in the small of the back, especially on stooping, [1b] . ► Cramplike pain in the small of the back, on standing upright, and while walking, [1b] . ► Tension and tearing in the small of the back, extending into the hips and back again, [1a] . ► Burning pain in the loins and small of the back, [1b] . ► Pressive stitches in the right lumbar region, while standing, [1b] . ► Tensive pain in the back, and especially in the sacral region, [1a] . EXTREMITIES. ► A weary pain in the limbs, while at rest, [1a] . ► Pressive sticking pains in the right shoulder, [1a] . [70.] ► Pressive pain and sticking in the right shoulder, stitches shoot from the shoulder deep into the right chest (after one hour), [1a] . ► The arm that is resting upon the table feels weary and falls asleep, [1a] . ► Fine sticking and drawing pain in the right upper arm, extending to the hand, with a sensation of shivering, extending through the limb, [1a] . ► Pain in the hips and pelvis, as if broken, [1a] . ► A cold stream, extending into the right leg and foot, now and then associated with fine stitches, [1a] . ► Painful burning in the corns (quite unusual), [1a] . GENERALITIES. ► The whole body feels weak and weary, [1b] . ► Weakness and general sick feeling, [1a] . SKIN. ► Fine stinging, as from nettles, deeply piercing the skin on the last joint of the right ring finger, while writing, [1a] . SLEEP. ► Frequent yawning, [1a] . [80.] ► Frequent yawning, with eructations of gas, [1a] . ► Overpowering sleepiness, for an hour after chewing the drug, [1] . ► (Sleep restless), [17] . ► Sleep dreamy, [1b] . FEVER. ► Unusual chilliness over the whole body (in a warm room and with the usual clothing), [1a] . ► Chilliness and shivering in the scalp; the hair bristles (even in a warm room), [1a] . ► Chilliness; great coldness mounting up the middle of the back, [1a] . ► Chilliness and sensation of coldness in the back, with an otherwise warm body, with icy-cold hands, [1a] . ► Great sensitiveness to every cool temperature; shivering, especially in the back, even whenever the window is opened, [1a] . ► Feeling of violent catarrhal fever, [1a] . [90.] ► Morning sweat, every morning, [1b] . CONDITIONS. ► Aggravation. ► ( Morning ), Vertigo; sweat. ► ( Afternoon ), Heat and rush of blood to head. ► ( During and after chewing ), Secretion of saliva. ► ( While reading ), Heaviness of head and inclination to sleep; pain in occiput. ► ( While reflecting ), Stitches in vertex. ► ( While at rest ), Weary pain in limbs. ► ( Standing ), Stitches in right lumbar region; upright, pain in small of back. ► ( Stooping ), Pain in small of back. ► ( After stooping ), Acid eructations. ► ( Walking ), Oppression on breath; pain in small of back. ► ( While writing ), Stinging in last joint of right ring finger. Clinical: Chilliness; Corns; Epistaxis; Fever; Headache; Lumbago; Stiff neck; Tinnitus

Oppression whilst walking, in open air and in house. Breathing short, difficult; feeling of apprehension in chest. Frequently impelled to take a long breath, which is difficult. Weary pain in limbs while at rest. Pressive, sticking pains in r. shoulder; stitches shoot deep into r. chest. The arm that is resting on the table feels weary and falls asleep. Fine sticking, drawing from r. upper arm to hand, with a shivering extending through the limb. Stinging as from nettles on last joint of r. ring finger. Pain in hips and pelvis as if broken. A cold stream, extending into r. leg and foot, with fine stitches now and them. Painful burning in corns (quite unusual). The whole body feels weak and weary. Weakness and general sick feeling.

keynotes.text: The majority of the symptoms of Pimpinella were obtained by Schelling from chewing the fresh root. The rest were contributed by Berridge, who proved the 1x on a man. Chilliness was a marked symptom, chilly in the back even in a warm room, and much if a window was opened. Sensitive to draughts. Sensation of coldness in occiput as from a cutting wind behind. Cold stream from hip and into right leg. The pains and sensations extended from one part to another, principally from above downward and from before backward (temples to nape; forehead to eyes; nape to shoulders), from within outward; or alternated between different parts. There was rush of blood to head, followed by nose-bleed; whizzing in head, roaring in ears. Sinking sensation in intestines. Weariness and falling asleep of parts rested on. Frequent yawning and desire to take a long breath, which was difficult. Great drowsiness. The symptoms were morning (vertigo sweat); afternoon (heat and rush of blood to head); by chewing reading; writing; reflecting; rest (weary pain in limbs); standing; stooping; after stooping; walking; by opening window; in warm room.

_raw: Compare: Rush of blood preceding nose-bleed, Graph. Occipital pains, Hell. n., Nat. s., Glon.

head.text: Vertigo: inclination to one side, morning, on rising; dizzy confusion. Heat, rush of blood and confusion of head, soon followed by nose-bleed; afternoon. Rushing in whole head, esp. down back part, with pressure. Whizzing in head and sounds as in an empty barrel. Dulness and heaviness in head, with drowsiness when reading. Head feels tied up and compressed. Sticking in forehead, extending to both sides along eyes. Sticking burning from vertex to both sides and down over temples. Pressing and pushing from temples to occiput and nape. Sensation of coldness in occiput as though a sharp draught constantly blowing from behind; in a closed room. Tension and pressive pain from occiput into nape. Pain in occiput, reading or thinking. Acute stitches in occiput concentrated in protuberance. Itching on vertex. Shivering of scalp, hair bristles.

eyes.text: Smarting pain in r. eye. Burning in eyes, esp. upper surface of eyeballs; disagreeable coolness. Smarting in lids. Vision dim, misty.

ears.text: Fine stitches extending out through r. ear, with roaring. Roaring in ears as from a distant sound.

face.text: Pain as from an ulcer in r. cheek.

mouth_throat.text: Sore, pressive pain in stump of tooth, l. lower jaw. Burning aroma on tongue, palate, and throat. Saliva increased during and after chewing. Collection of mucus in mouth and fauces, obliging hawking. Taste: acrid, burning, earthy; penetrating while chewing, later spreading a warmth through whole body; mouldy. Hawking of tenacious whitish mucus from arch of palate, and a crumbly, cheesy, offensive concretion from fauces.

stomach_abdomen.text: Eructations: frequent, of gas; with vertigo and yawning; tasteless; acid, after stooping. Fine stitches just above navel. Rumbling and gurgling. Sensation as if intestines would sink down from their own weight.

stool_rectum.text: Purging. Stool dry, harder than usual.

chest_heart.text: The portion of the chest against which he leans becomes painful as if weary. Transient, needle-like stitches, back and forth in sides of chest, back, small of back, and walls of abdomen. Sensation of heaviness in præcordial region and abdomen as if intestines would sink down of their own weight.

back.text: Stiff neck. Pressive, tensive pain from nape to shoulder. Constant, pressive, contractive pain alternately in nape, side of neck, and r. shoulder. Constant tension and sticking in nape and occiput. Constrictive, cramp-like pain in small of back, esp. on stooping; on standing upright; on walking. Tension and tearing in small of back, extending into hips and back. Burning in loins and small of back. Pressive stitches in loins. Tensive pain in back, esp. sacral region.

skin.text: Fine stinging as from nettles deeply piercing the skin on last joint of r. ring finger, while writing.

sleep.text: Frequent yawning; with eructations. Overpowering sleepiness (for an hour after chewing the drug). Sleep dreamy.

fever_chill.text: Unusual chilliness over whole body (in warm room). Chilliness and shivering of scalp, the hair bristles (in warm-room). Chill runs up middle of back; rest of body warm, and icy cold hands. Great sensitiveness to every cool temperature, shivering in back when window is opened. Violent catarrhal fever. Sweat every morning. Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main.
